seo.title: Website + CMS (Recommended) | Vantus Systems
seo.meta_description: This is the best-fit package for most growing businesses. It gives you the public credibility of a modern rebuild plus the internal control to manage content without waiting on a developer.

hero.headline: Website + CMS (Recommended)
hero.subheadline: This is the best-fit package for most growing businesses. It gives you the public credibility of a modern rebuild plus the internal control to manage content without waiting on a developer.

sections.heading: Best for
sections.body: Growing teams that need publishing control and content velocity.

sections.heading: What changes after launch
sections.body: Your team can publish. Case studies and proof pages become maintainable. Services can evolve without rebuilding the site. Approval flow becomes cleaner. And the business stops treating website updates like a technical emergency.

sections.heading: What this offer does not include by default
Common add-ons and next moves
sections.body: This package is where most businesses should land. From here, the usual next step is either deeper content operations or the move into portal and workflow work.

items.q: Why is this the recommended package?
items.a: Because it adds recurring operational value. A rebuild improves presentation. A CMS improves presentation and control. That is a better long-term return for most businesses.

items.q: Can non-technical staff actually use it?
items.a: That is part of the acceptance logic for this offer. Editorial workflow and operator enablement are core scope, not afterthoughts.

items.q: What if we later need a customer portal?
items.a: That is the next offer tier. The public offer ladder is designed to move from public presence to content control to workflow software as the need becomes real.

sections.heading: This is usually the right place to start if the business plans to grow
